decisions.description: Add a loyaltyPoints int custom field on Customer, non-nullable with default 0 and readonly from storefront mutations.
Add a brandStory localeText custom field on Product, nullable, with a rich-text-form-input UI component; editable only from Admin and readonly for the storefront.
Add a hazmat boolean custom field on ProductVariant, non-nullable with default false.
Add a complianceDocument relation custom field on ProductVariant that links to a new ComplianceDocument entity.
Extend the CustomProductFields and CustomCustomerFields interfaces from @vendure/core via TypeScript declaration merging so custom-field access is compile-time type-safe.
Run schema:synchronize in staging first as a CI validation step because custom field changes trigger a TypeORM schema sync that can be destructive if there are manual schema modifications.
Avoid the struct custom field type when sub-field filtering is required, because struct stores as simple-json and cannot be filtered or indexed at the SQL level.

action_items.text: Implement the custom field config changes and test the migration
Customize the Admin UI for brandStory (rich-text editor)
Add the schema:synchronize staging validation step to the CI pipeline
Write the ComplianceDocument entity for the relation custom field
